author: dragonish
description: Implement displaying specific content around headings based on their levels.

manifest.description: Implement displaying specific content around headings based on their levels.
manifest.name: Heading Decorator

name: Heading Decorator

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Features
- **editor:** add gutter-based heading decorator renderer (7d21665b7f67b3fde88c7f67a8c9c8b41f542472)
- **gutter:** add independent settings, font size dropdown, and 100% default opacity (a2501103c447c0ae737297c2a8a359ebb4adb1bf)

## Bug Fixes
- **styles:** improve gutter marker visibility and font size (95a85495d399e0f17989636c1101cfcbe9339f90)

## UI Improvements
- **locales:** update the translation for Traditional Chinese (7d856aa24658e027f3bdc7df9ffd08b2520c7a0c)

## Contributors

- @dragonish
- @victoraraujo105
releases.name: Release 3.1.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Refinements
- **setting:** optimize the settings page (29c9403abc30f3624b4c09e01fa307fbff47a074)
releases.name: Release 3.0.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Features
- **attr:** add a new attribute to decorator elements (ac1c3b1b189b2ebcfb75df7826fd037330cec121)
- add a new independent decorator mode (c0bd1e15aa6586b55d2d8fe492e33810b0cd469b)
- **setting:** show simple examples in decorator style type options (63c64a393f68b9c7ed15279e83742372a068e9ab)
- add a new splice decorator mode (138c7841c99c8080491af8469dda79d650dfc826)

## BREAKING CHANGES
- due to [c0bd1e](https://github.com/dragonish/obsidian-heading-decorator/commit/c0bd1e15aa6586b55d2d8fe492e33810b0cd469b): add a new independent decorator mode

adjust some settings, introduce a new decorator mode setting.
releases.name: Release 3.0.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Bug Fixes
- **plugin:** fix blocklist not working in edit view (9cfeacb5e30c1dd136a7bbec9b2909e438552049)
- **plugin:** fix blocklist not working in edit view when metadata keyword is empty (4e40be4f3d1880c3f12e14f230f43381f064aa47)

releases.description:

- **heading:** fix unordered list mistakenly identified as level 2 heading
- **outline:** fix exceptions when the heading contains some special symbols

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:

- **source:** allow to hide number signs (#) in source mode
releases.name: Release 1.8.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Features
- add support for the "Headings in Explorer" plugin
- **styles:** allow custom decorator spacing using CSS variables

## Performance Improvements
- **outline:** improve the timing of reading settings

## Enhancements
- **outline:** remove the decorator immediately when detaching the function
- **frontmatter:** improve the parsing of `cssclasses`

## Refinements
- **settings:** adjust the description element of the settings
- **settings:** optimize navigation between settings pages

## UI Improvements
- **settings:** change some words
releases.name: Release 1.7.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Features
- allow for easy customization of decorator styles

## Bug Fixes

- **styles:** fix some issues that could not be rendered in live preview
releases.name: Release 1.6.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Features

## Bug Fixes

releases.name: Release 1.5.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Features
- support control of the enabled status in each note
- support read the enabled status from the `cssclasses` field of property
- **settings:** allow to setting a maximum number of ignored headings
- add support for blacklist function

## Bug Fixes
- **settings:** add missing settings tab name

## Performance Improvements
- **outline:** recycle end-of-life components
- **outline:** improve efficiency

## Refinements
- **data:** supplement the default setting value

## UI Improvements
- **settings:** adjust the settings page

releases.author: github-actions[bot]

- **outline:** handle cases where the heading contains html

releases.name: Release 1.1.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Features
- add allow level can be displayed as zero

## Bug Fixes
- **preview:** fix render exception when heading contains inline code in live preview
- **heading:** fix some judgment errors for heading alternate syntax
- **reading:** fix reading view not render in some cases
- **editing:** fix last line in editing view not rendered
- **heading:** fix some judgment errors for heading alternate syntax

## Enhancements
- optimize the interaction between the decorator and the collapse button
- **editing:** optimize the user experience in the editing view

## Refinements
- **styles:** optimize the situation when "Fold heading" is not enabled
releases.name: Release 1.1.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Features
- implement decoration for reading view
- implement decoration for live preview and source mode
- add support to ignore the single heading at the top-level
- support independent configuration of decorators for each editor mode

## Bug Fixes
- **source:** fix the heading decorator in source mode that might render an exception
- **view:** fix inability to detect editor mode switching
- **preview:** fix decorator render exception when a heading other than current row is selected

## Refinements
- **counter:** avoid potentially modify constant value

## UI Improvements
- **setting:** improved description of settings
releases.name: Release 1.0.0
